scripts.render: remotion render src/index.jsx PactaSpin assets/.pacta-bot-spin-remotion.webm --codec=vp8 --pixel-format=yuva420p --image-format=png --video-bitrate=8M --concurrency=1 --chromium-angle=swiftshader --quiet && ffmpeg -v error -i assets/.pacta-bot-spin-remotion.webm -map 0:v:0 -c:v copy -an -y assets/pacta-bot-spin-transparent.webm && rm -f assets/.pacta-bot-spin-remotion.webm
